title: [MTR3] StarTrain AG800
description: This adds a fictional, refurbished train for MTR3. An MTR4 version is coming soon!
body:
## About

This pack is a recreated version of the original Antigravity Subway (released on Planet Minecraft):
[Original Antigravity Subway pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/antigravity-subway-requires-mtr-mod/)

This pack adds only one train, the StarTrain AG800. This modernized version now has more seats, and screen displays on the interior.

### This pack requires MTR mod, specifically MTR3!

MTR4 version coming soon!
